name: Daves Tours · API
description: Public API surface for this Daves region site. Used by the website's contact form and exposed for agents that want to submit a tour enquiry programmatically.

apis.name: Contact / enquiry
apis.description: Submits a tour enquiry. Sends an email to the bookings team via Resend. Forwards the user back to /contact/ with a sent or error query parameter.

tour.description: Slug of the tour the enquirer is interested in.

about.description: Slug of a related tour, used for private-charter enquiries.

responses.303: Redirects to /contact/ with ?sent=1 on success or ?error=<code> on validation failure.
